name: Sauteed Flageolet Beans with Fusilli
recipeIngredient: Generous 1 tablespoon Balsalmic vinegar and olive oil Salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta first (allow about 15 minutes).
2. Bring plenty of water to a boil in a big pot. Add a pinch of salt, a dash of olive oil and the pasta. Cook al dente; drain; set aside.
3. Meanwhile, cut onion into 1/4-inch slices, quarter the slices and separate the rings. (Pieces should be about the size of a pasta twist.) Gently drain and rinse the beans. Mince the tarragon. Prepare accompaniments.
4. Prepare the sauce (about 15 minutes total):
a. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a wok or skillet.
b. Saute the onion over medium to medium-high until the onion is softer and sweeter; about 3 to 5 minutes.
c. Over medium heat, gently add the drained beans to the onion; season with salt, pepper, tarragon (as much or as little as you like) and heat for 2 to 3 minutes.
d. Stir in the pasta. Heat for 3 to 5 minutes.
e. Remove from heat. Add the bottled vinaigrette made with balsamic vinegar and toss. Serve immediately.
